com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx

Class JavaTypePlatformResponse

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx.JavaTypePlatformResponse
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    HttpJavaTypePlatformResponse

    public class JavaTypePlatformResponse
extends java.lang.Object

    Transmit data(Variable and DataSet) with OutputStream or Writer.

    data transmissionshould be processed as below.

    1. object initialization - JavaTypePlatformResponse creation
    2. transmission start - summon JavaTypePlatformResponse.start() (can be ommited)
    3. Variable transmission - JavaTypePlatformResponse.sendVariable(String, int, Object) summon
    4. Variable transmission repeat
    5. DataSet transmission - JavaTypePlatformResponse.sendDataSet(String) summon
    6. DataSet ColumnHeader transmission - JavaTypePlatformResponse.sendDataSetHeader(String, int, int) summon
    7. DataSet ColumnHeader transmission repeat
    8. DataSet ConstantColumnHeader transmission - JavaTypePlatformResponse.sendDataSetConstantHeader(String, int, int, Object) summon (can be omitted)
    9. DataSet ConstantColumnHeader transmission repeat
    10. DataSet row data transmission - JavaTypePlatformResponse.sendDataSetRow(Object[]) summon
    11. DataSet row data transmission repeat
    12. DataSet transmission repeat
    13. transmission closure - JavaTypePlatformResponse.end() summon (summon essential)

    Variable transmission and DataSet transmission can be omitted respectively, and if transmitting Variable after transmitting DataSet, exception occurs. Also, DataSet row data count and order should be assured by user.

    Author:
    Choi, Jongkwan
    See Also:
    PlatformResponse, PartPlatformResponse

        Return transmission/reception type(contentType). transmission/reception type indicates data expression type as XML, Binary.

      • isVerbose

        public boolean isVerbose()
